note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable godog step drives real code and passes (must name a test); pending = specified behavior whose implementation does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). Every scenario here is present — the recency/decay discipline and the discovery-corpus flush are implemented and bound.

scenarios.name: A lesson carries provenance and an aged lesson is down-weighted and pruned
A learned co-occurrence count halves over a half-life and a faded pair ages out
An estate learned edge a fresh observation contradicts decays and ages out
Decay ages learned state only and never touches ground truth or the estate
The discovery-corpus flush drains captured deviations to the durable corpus file
